title: chamaecrista nictitans subsp. nictitans
intro: Chamaecrista nictitans subsp. nictitans, also known as partridge pea or sensitive plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chamaecrista nictitans subsp. nictitans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional practices as a poultice or topical application.
